raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$4500.00} credit card charge ( Reference Number : XXXX ) for services from CXXXX XXXX XXXX a fraudulent merchant that misrepresented their services and is no longer in business. 

I originally filed this dispute in XX/XX/year>. A few days before the case was supposed to be finalized, Citibank closed the dispute, stating that I had withdrawn it. I did not withdraw my dispute, nor did I authorize any withdrawal. 

I contacted Citibank multiple times requesting the case be reopened. On XX/XX/year>, I submitted all supporting documentation again in PDF format as requested, including : My complaints filed with the Federal Trade Commission ( FTC ), the XXXX XXXX Crime Complaint Center ( XXXX ), and the Pennsylvania Attorney Generals Office. 

Evidence of the merchants misrepresentation and closure. 

Despite my submission, Citibank has not responded or acknowledged receipt of my documents. This failure violates the Fair Credit Billing Act, which requires acknowledgment of a billing error notice within 30 days and resolution within XXXX billing cycles. 

I am requesting CFPB assistance to ensure that Citibank : Reinstates and escalates my dispute for proper investigation. 

Corrects any records showing I withdrew the dispute. 

Provides a written response confirming receipt of my supporting documentation. 

I am also requesting that Citibank issue a provisional credit of {$4500.00} to my account while the dispute is being properly investigated, in compliance with the Fair Credit Billing Act.

This is a significant amount of money, and Citibanks failure to respond has left me without recourse.
